name: BB:UBA : DNS Common Filter
notes: Building block for common tests for all DNS App related rules. Maps to IBM DNS Analyzer DSM and other UBA common filters.
bb_references: BB:UBA : DNS Common Filter on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM DNS Analyzer
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
